name: E-2 options schema: profile-supplied tuple options override schema defaults for the same key in resolved_options
command:
mkdir -p tree/g && printf 'rules:
  - id: g-ts-102
    options_schema:
      properties:
        budget_kb:
          default: 250
' > tree/g/rules.yaml && printf 'rules:
  g-ts-102:
    - error
    - budget_kb: 500
' > p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --explain g-ts-102 --profile p.yaml --tree tree 2>err.txt; grep -q '"budget_kb":500' err.txt && echo override_won 1>&2
